raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/XXXX, XXXX XXXX out of XXXX  XXXX, XXXX took photographs of our department and individuals pre-paid for portraits and yearbooks. I purchased a yearbook on XX/XX/XXXX in the amount of {$52.00} that was charged to my Citi Visa card. 

I along with several others have contacted XXXX and they continue to change the date as to when we will receive the books. I filed a dispute with my credit card company and they said they would issue me the credit, but now state that the charge is more than 6 months old and they can not help. 

I called XXXX once again on XX/XX/XXXX and requested a refund. I was told that they would call me back by Wednesday, XX/XX/XXXX and I still have not heard from anyone.
